hooks.command: if cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE 'packages/(client|admin)/src/hooks/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: All hooks must be in packages/shared/src/hooks/' >&2; exit 2; fi
if cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE 'packages/[^/]+/\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Package-level .env files not allowed. Use root .env only.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)bun test( |$)' && ! printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'bun run test'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use `bun run test` not `bun test` — bun test uses the built-in runner which ignores vitest config.' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qiE 'deploy.*mainnet|upgrade.*mainnet|vercel.*--prod'; then echo 'PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT — Requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding'; fi
CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git.*push.*--force.*(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never force push to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)git commit'; then REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd "$REPO_ROOT" && bun lint --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/(resolvers/|Schemas\.sol|interfaces/IGardenAccessControl\.sol|accounts/Garden\.sol)'; then echo 'DOMAIN REVIEW: Editing attestation/access-control code.'; echo '  Verify: no self-attestation paths, schema encoding matches tuple format,'; echo '  access control checks intact, storage gaps correct.'; fi; exit 0
printf '%s\n' 'Green Goods Claude Code' '  /plan /debug /review /audit /teams /meeting-notes' '  Agents: oracle | cracked-coder | code-reviewer | migration | triage'

echo '## Post-Compaction Reminders
- Use `bun run test` (NEVER `bun test`) — bun test ignores vitest config
- Never use `forge build`/`forge test` directly — always use bun wrappers
- ALL hooks MUST live in packages/shared/src/hooks/ (not client or admin)
- Single .env at root only — never create package-specific .env files
- Import from `@green-goods/shared` barrel only — never deep paths
- Use `Address` type (not string) for Ethereum addresses
- Use `logger` from shared (not console.log)
- Use `parseContractError()` + `USER_FRIENDLY_ERRORS` for contract errors'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'packages/contracts/out/'; then npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'packages/shared/src/'; then REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd "$REPO_ROOT/packages/shared" && bunx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/resolvers/.*\.sol$' && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then GAP=$(grep -oE 'uint256\[[0-9]+\].*__gap' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '\[[0-9]+\]' | tr -d '[]'); if [ -n "$GAP" ]; then VARS=$(grep -E '^\s+(uint|int|bool|address|bytes32|bytes|string|mapping|I[A-Z])\S*\s+(public|private|internal)\s' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -cv '__gap\|immutable' || echo 0); TOTAL=$((GAP + VARS)); if [ "$TOTAL" -ne 50 ]; then echo "STORAGE GAP WARNING: $FILE has $VARS state vars + $GAP gap slots = $TOTAL (expected 50)"; fi; fi; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'packages/contracts/src/resolvers/.*\.sol$'; then REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); RESOLVER=$(basename "$FILE" .sol); CHANGED_TESTS=$(cd "$REPO_ROOT" && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c "test/.*${RESOLVER}Resolver\.t\.sol" || true); if [ "$CHANGED_TESTS" -eq 0 ]; then echo "RESOLVER WITHOUT TESTS: Modified $RESOLVER but no corresponding test file changed yet."; echo "  Resolver changes should include test updates."; fi; fi; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Green Goods"'
